title: Fluffy Tangy Peruvian Eggplant Stir-fry
description: This tangy and fluffy dish features a unique blend of savory eggplants cooked in a tandoor-style preparation, providing a show-off peruvian treat that is dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 cup sliced eggplant
ingredients.notes: Use any variety of eggplant but aubergine is most common.

ingredients.name: 1 small onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with red bell pepper or zucchini for variation.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup tomato paste
ingredients.notes: For a more tangy flavor and texture.

instructions: Place the sliced eggplant on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Season lightly with salt and toss gently in olive oil until well coated.
Bake for about 25-30 minutes or until slightly caramelized and tender, flipping halfway through.
In a small mixing bowl, combine lemon juice, tomato paste, ground cumin, pinch of salt, and garlic. Mix until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the mixed sauce to the skillet and stir for about 2 minutes until it starts bubbling slightly.
Reduce heat to low and gently fold in the eggplant slices, allowing them to absorb the flavorful sauce evenly.
Remove from heat and garnish with fresh cilantro just before serving.
